rag_rules: Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they reference component type ports
Use AGREE syntax: assume "label": expression;, guarantee "label": expression;, eq name : type = expression;, const name : type = value;, assign output = expression;
Write output range guarantees in component type annexes using visible ports and concrete bounds
Avoid using subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Use AGREE scalar types: int, real, bool
generic_rules: Avoid using AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions
Align helper declaration types with expression types
Use concrete bounds or named constants for range assumptions and guarantees
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks are written as annex agree {** ... **};
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations
Implementation annexes are for implementation-level bindings
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit ports or constants
Do not use invalid AGREE scalar type names like integer or boolean
